prompt: Write a Go test (package sandbox) for IsEven(n int) bool, true when n is even.

metadata.correct:
package sandbox

func IsEven(n int) bool { return n%2 == 0 }
metadata.mutant:
package sandbox

func IsEven(n int) bool { return n%2 == 1 }
